originalTitle: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
title: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
content: One of Sudan's most popular bands, Aswat Almadina, recall being in the studio when the war broke out three years ago.

originalTitle: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government
title: Our Friend Teddy Afro Sings for All of Us in Ethiopia!
content:
Hello, amazing kids! Welcome to our special news report from beautiful Africa! Today, we have a wonderful story for you from a country called Ethiopia. Ethiopia is a big and beautiful land in East Africa. It has tall mountains, ancient history, and lots of friendly people. Just like your home, it's full of fun things! Today, we are going to talk about a very, very famous singer from Ethiopia. His name is Teddy Afro. He is like a superhero, but he uses his wonderful voice to make people happy!

Meet Teddy Afro: Our Music Star!

Teddy Afro is not just any singer; he is a superstar! Millions and millions of people in Ethiopia know his songs. When he sings, everyone loves to listen, dance, and sing along. He sings all kinds of songs. Some make you want to dance with joy! Some make you feel calm and thoughtful. His music makes people feel good in their hearts. Teddy Afro has been singing for many years. He is famous because his songs often talk about things that are important to the people of Ethiopia. Did you know? Music is like magic! It can make you feel many different feelings, like happy, calm, or excited, even if you don't understand the words! Recently, Teddy Afro released a brand-new song. And guess what? Lots and lots of people are listening to it! It has a very special message.

What is Teddy's New Song About?

Teddy's new song has a super important message for everyone. It talks about people in Ethiopia being like a big, happy family. Sometimes, even in the best families, brothers and sisters might have a tiny disagreement. That's okay, but it's always best to be friends again, right? Teddy's song reminds everyone to be friends. It tells people to help each other and to be kind to everyone, no matter where they come from in Ethiopia. It's like saying, "Let's all play nicely together in the biggest sandbox ever! Let's share our toys and make new friends." The song encourages people to think about how much stronger they are when they work together. Like a team, everyone can make Ethiopia an even better place. Did you know? Ethiopia has over 80 different languages! Isn't that amazing? But music can bring everyone together, no matter what language they speak, because feelings are understood by everyone. The song wants everyone to remember that they are all Ethiopians. And that means they can achieve great things if they are united.

Why is Unity Important?

What does "unity" mean? It means being together, like a team! Imagine you are playing a game of soccer with your friends. If everyone helps each other, passes the ball, and works together, your team can score goals and win! You feel happy and strong together. But if everyone tries to do their own thing, it's much harder to win. It's not as much fun, either. Teddy's song says Ethiopia is like that big soccer team. When everyone is united, they can build amazing new schools, plant more trees, and share happy times and beautiful stories. Being united means being kind to your neighbors. It means sharing your toys or your lunch. It means listening to each other's ideas, even if they are different from yours. Did you know? Ethiopia is famous for being where coffee was first discovered! Many people around the world drink coffee every day that started its journey in Ethiopia. That's a fun fact! When people are united, they can solve problems together. They can laugh together and celebrate special days. Unity makes a country strong and full of joy.

Music Makes Us Stronger!

Music is a very powerful tool. It can make us dance and laugh out loud. It can make us feel like we want to sing at the top of our lungs! But music can also help us think about important things. It can help us understand big ideas like kindness, friendship, and working together. When Teddy Afro sings about unity, many people listen very carefully. They start to think, "Yes, he is right! Let's be kind! Let's work together!" Millions of people heard his song on the radio. They heard it on their parents' phones and on the television. It's like a big, happy message spreading everywhere in Ethiopia! This shows how important music can be. A song can help people remember to be good to each other and build a stronger community. Did you know? Music is a universal language! Even if you don't understand the words, the beat and the feeling of a song can make you smile or dance, no matter where you are in the world!

Being Good Friends in Ethiopia

Ethiopia is a land of many wonderful people. They have different traditions, amazing food, and beautiful clothes. All these differences make Ethiopia a very colorful and special place. Teddy's song celebrates all these differences. But it also says that deep down, everyone wants to be friends. Everyone wants to live in peace and be happy together. It's about respecting each other. It's about celebrating what makes each person special. Just like in your classroom, everyone is unique, and that's wonderful! When we are united, we learn from each other. We can share our traditions and our stories. This makes everyone's life richer and more fun. Did you know? Ethiopia is one of the oldest countries in the world, with a history that goes back thousands and thousands of years! That's older than many countries! So, Teddy Afro's song is a reminder that being together, being united, is the best way for Ethiopia to shine brightly.

Let's All Sing Together!

So, Teddy Afro, our amazing music star, is using his beautiful voice and his music to help people remember to be together. He wants everyone to feel happy, safe, and loved in their country. His song is like a warm hug for all of Ethiopia, saying, "Let's be friends, always." It reminds us that being united means we can all do amazing things. We can build a wonderful future, full of kindness and laughter. What a wonderful and important message from our African music star! Let's all remember to be united in our own homes and schools, too! Thank you for listening to our news report today, amazing kids! Keep shining bright!
summary: Ethiopian superstar Teddy Afro released a new song that millions are listening to, sharing a powerful message about unity and friendship for all the people of Ethiopia.
whyMatters: This is important because when a famous singer like Teddy Afro sings about everyone being friends and working together, it helps many people think about being kind and united, which can make a country stronger and happier for everyone.
